---
title: Block 4
---
```{r, echo = FALSE, results='asis'}
library(webexercises)
source("include/helper.R")
```

## Exercises

### Übungen 4 – A1
Berechnen Sie die folgenden Integrale.

```{r exercise-4a1, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(a) $\\int_{0}^{2} (x^{3} + 2x)\\,dx$",
	choices = c(
		"$6$",
		"$12$",
		answer = "$8$"
	),
	solution = "$\\int_{0}^{2} (x^{3} + 2x)\\,dx = \\tfrac{1}{4}x^{4} + x^{2}\\big|_{0}^{2} = 8$."
)
```

```{r exercise-4a2, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(b) $\\int_{-2}^{2} e^{2x}\\,dx$",
	choices = c(
		"$e^{4} - 1$",
		answer = "$27.29$",
		"$23$"
	),
	solution = "$\\int_{-2}^{2} e^{2x}\\,dx = \\tfrac{1}{2}e^{2x}\\big|_{-2}^{2} = \\tfrac{1}{2}(e^{4} - e^{-4}) \\approx 27.29$."
)
```

```{r exercise-4a3, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(c) $\\int_{0}^{2} (x + 4)^{2}\\,dx$",
	choices = c(
		"$\\tfrac{152}{3}$",
		"$50$",
		answer = "$50\\tfrac{2}{3}$"
	),
	solution = "Nach dem Ausmultiplizieren ergibt $\\int_{0}^{2}(x^{2} + 8x + 16)\\,dx = (\\tfrac{1}{3}x^{3} + 4x^{2} + 16x)\\big|_{0}^{2} = 50\\tfrac{2}{3}$."
)
```

```{r exercise-4a4, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(d) $\\int 4x\\,dx$",
	choices = c(
		"$2x + c$",
		answer = "$2x^{2} + c$",
		"$4x^{2} + c$"
	),
	solution = "Eine Stammfunktion lautet $2x^{2} + c$."
)
```

### Übungen 4 – A2
Berechnen Sie die Fläche unterhalb der Funktion im angegebenen Intervall. Skizzieren Sie die Funktion.

```{r exercise-4a5, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(a) $f(x) = -2x$, Fläche im Intervall $[-2, 2]$",
	choices = c(
		answer = "$8$",
		"$0$",
		"$4$"
	),
	solution = paste(
		"Nullstelle bei $x = 0$, Stammfunktion $F(x) = -x^{2}$.",
		"Die Fläche setzt sich aus zwei Dreiecken zusammen: $|F(0) - F(-2)| + |F(2) - F(0)| = 4 + 4 = 8$.",
		"<br><img src=\"images/image_4A2_a.png\" width=\"300\">"
	)
)
```

```{r exercise-4a6, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(b) $f(x) = \\begin{cases} 0 & \\text{für } x < 0 \\\\ -x^{2} + \\tfrac{4}{3} & \\text{für } 0 \\le x \\le 1 \\\\ 0 & \\text{für } x > 1 \\end{cases}$ im Intervall $[0,2]$",
	choices = c(
		"$\\tfrac{1}{3}$",
		"$\\tfrac{4}{3}$",
		answer = "$1$"
	),
	solution = paste(
		"Zwischen 0 und 1 gilt $f(x) = -x^{2} + \\tfrac{4}{3}$ und $F(x) = -\\tfrac{1}{3}x^{3} + \\tfrac{4}{3}x$.",
		"Da außerhalb dieses Abschnitts $f(x) = 0$ ist, ergibt sich die Fläche zu $F(1) - F(0) = -\\tfrac{1}{3} + \\tfrac{4}{3} = 1$.",
		"<br><img src=\"images/image_4A2_b.png\" width=\"300\">"
	)
)
```
